item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 28min “I think it’s due a change and something the PDC will actually do. I think it will next year.”
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 28min “I think it’s due a change and something the PDC will actually do. I think it will next year.”
Luke Humphries proposes new Premier League format, discusses Nando’s black card, and current form.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/humphries-call s-for-premier-league-format-change/ …
In association with @DiamondXDraws Mostrar más 1 106

item.title:
